message:
perf(timer): bitmap skip + in-place drain for wheel hot paths (bd-1ddgq)

Add occupied bitmap to WheelLevel for O(4) slot scanning instead of
O(256) linear scan in next_skip_tick. Rewrite drain_ready to use
in-place swap_remove, eliminating the per-tick `remaining` Vec
allocation. Clear bitmap bits in tick_level0/cascade after mem::take.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
